name: slider
description: APG Slider on a platform native input[type=range]. Single-thumb default, dual-thumb range mode, horizontal or vertical. Marks, value tooltip, disabled, aria-invalid. The slider.enhancer.ts handles --slider-pct sync, range clamp + ARIA constraint updates, and tooltip text on drag.
docs: Copies the slider partial to your JTE root at lievit/slider.jte. The native range input is the accessible spine (role=slider + Arrow/Home/End keyboard for free). The optional slider.enhancer.ts keeps --slider-pct in sync and handles range-mode clamp + APG multithumb ARIA constraint updates. Single-thumb: pass value/min/max/step + ariaLabel. Range mode: set rangeMode=true + valueLow/valueHigh + ariaLabelLow/ariaLabelHigh. Marks: pass a List of Map(value,label). Tooltip: showTooltip="always|hover|never".
